chunks.text: 1 Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 156 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case (Notice issued to AAG, APG and respondents) 30.07.2021 Mr. Rehmatullah Mangnejo Advocate for petitioner Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, AAG Sindh Syed Sardar Ali Shah, DPG for the State a/w ASI Ali Asghar Lakhair of P.S Mithiani, ASI Muhammad Bux Khoso of P.S Tharushah, ASI Gada Hussain Solangi of P.S Kot Mitha Khan, ASI Zulfiqar Ali Ujjan of P.S Kandiaro, SIP Muhammad Yakoob Soomro P.S Mithiani, ASI Muhammad Qasim Pahwar of P.S Taggar and ASI Liaquat Ali Khoso of P.S Naushahro Feroze >>>>>>>>..<<<<<<< Mr. Asif Ali Arain Associate of Mr. Riazat Ali Sahar has filed vakalatnama on behalf of private respondents 9 to 15 and 19 along with photocopy of objections / comments, same are hereby taken on record, copy whereof is provided to learned counsel for the petitioner. Process issued against respondents have also been returned by SIP Muhammad Yakoob of Police Station Mithiani duly served partly, is hereby taken on record. Official respondents 2 to 8 filed their respective statements / comments, same being self- explanatory are hereby taken on record, copy whereof is provided to learned counsel for the petitioner. Learned counsel for private respondents 9 to 15 and 19 submits that neither the private respondents have harassed the petitioner nor would harass him in future, but on the contrary the petitioner himself has filed Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.2294/2021 u/s 22-A and B Cr.P.C against them which has also been dismissed by learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Kandiaro vide order dated 28.06.2021.

Official respondents 2 to 8 filed their respective statements / comments, same being self- explanatory are hereby taken on record, copy whereof is provided to learned counsel for the petitioner. Learned counsel for private respondents 9 to 15 and 19 submits that neither the private respondents have harassed the petitioner nor would harass him in future, but on the contrary the petitioner himself has filed Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.2294/2021 u/s 22-A and B Cr.P.C against them which has also been dismissed by learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Kandiaro vide order dated 28.06.2021. In support of his contentions, he has filed photocopy of the order, which is taken on record. Official respondents present also deny the allegations leveled by the petitioner against them, however, have categorically stated that neither they have harassed the petitioner nor will harass him in future and he will be provided legal protection according to law, if petitioner may approach to them. 2 Consequent to above submissions, the counsel for the petitioner shown his satisfaction and seeks disposal of this petition as per the proposal made by the counsel for the private respondents in the above terms and learned AAG Sindh and DPG for State. Accordingly, the instant Constitutional Petition in view of the above is hereby disposed of. Judge ARBROHI
